headline: RBC Capital Reiterates Outperform on SLB, Maintains $61 Price Target
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Keith Mackey   reiterates SLB (NYSE:SLB) with a Outperform and maintains $61 price target.

headline: Why SLB (SLB) Stock Is Down Today
summary: Shares of oilfield services provider SLB (NYSE:SLB) fell 3.2% in the morning session after the price of oil fell sharply as the U.S. and Iran announced a peace deal to end their conflict.
